Hand #2651598865 - Holdem (No Limit) - $0.01/$0.02 - 2026/01/22 11:09:21 UTC
McCook 9-max Seat #9 is the button
Seat 1: Ddrupp ($5.51)
Seat 2: TestHero ($2.00)
Seat 3: Freddeyz ($2.67)
Seat 4: PokerBossBabe ($2.67)
Seat 7: SIA73 ($2.17)
Seat 8: BigJames73 ($0.87)
Seat 9: CPTMYK713 ($0.97)
Ddrupp posts the small blind $0.01
TestHero posts the big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to TestHero [Qd Jc]
Freddeyz folds
PokerBossBabe calls $0.02
SIA73 folds
BigJames73 folds
CPTMYK713 folds
Ddrupp calls $0.01
TestHero raises $1.98 to $2.00 and is all-in
PokerBossBabe folds
Ddrupp folds
Uncalled bet ($1.98) returned to TestHero
TestHero does not show
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.06
Seat 1: Ddrupp (small blind) folded on the Pre-Flop
